Name: Network Quality
Author: David Sandilands

Actions.Name: Network Quality Test
Actions.Tooltip: Run a macOS networkQuality test and show download, upload, and responsiveness.

Description:
Run Apple's built-in networkQuality speed test right from your Stream Deck. Press a key to measure your internet download speed, upload speed, and responsiveness (RPM) — latency under load — with color-coded results shown directly on the key. It's free and open source, with no accounts, API keys, or third-party servers.

Features:
• One-press testing with a live progress animation (~15 seconds)
• Download, upload, and responsiveness (RPM) at a glance, color-coded for quick reading
• Auto-refresh on a configurable interval (every N minutes)
• Choose units (Auto / Mbps / Gbps), parallel or sequential mode, and a specific network interface
• Optional routing through iCloud Private Relay
• Latest results stay on the key after each test, so your numbers are always visible

Requirements:
• macOS 12 (Monterey) or later — uses the networkQuality tool built into macOS
• Stream Deck app 7.1 or later
